lines: +<%= content_tag :div, "Loading...", id: chart_id, style: "height: 300px; width: 100%; text-align: center; color: #999; line-height: 300px; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'Lucida Grande', 'Lucida Sans Unicode', Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;" %>
+    <%= blazer_js_var "chart", {id: chart_id, type: type, data: data, options: options} %>
-    <% chart_options = {id: chart_id, thousands: t("number.format.delimiter"), decimal: t("number.format.separator")} %>
<% chart_data = @columns[1..-1].each_with_index.map{ |k, i| {name: blazer_series_name(k), data: @rows.map{ |r| [r[0], r[i + 1]] }, library: series_library[i]} } %>
+      <%= render partial: "chart", locals: {type: "LineChart", data: chart_data, options: chart_options} %>

<% chart_data = @rows.group_by { |r| v = r[1]; (@smart_values[@columns[1]] || {})[v.to_s] || v }.each_with_index.map { |(name, v), i| {name: blazer_series_name(name), data: v.map { |v2| [v2[0], v2[2]] }, library: series_library[i]} } %>
+      <%= render partial: "chart", locals: {type: "LineChart", data: chart_data, options: chart_options} %>
+      <%= render partial: "chart", locals: {type: "PieChart", data: chart_data, options: chart_options} %>

<% chart_data = (values.size - 1).times.map { |i| name = @columns[i + 1]; {name: blazer_series_name(name), data: @rows.first(20).map { |r| [(@smart_values[@columns[0]] || {})[r[0].to_s] || r[0], r[i + 1]] } } } %>
+      <%= render partial: "chart", locals: {type: "ColumnChart", data: chart_data, options: chart_options} %>

<% chart_data = first_20.group_by { |r| v = r[1]; (@smart_values[@columns[1]] || {})[v.to_s] || v }.each_with_index.map { |(name, v), i| {name: blazer_series_name(name), data: v.sort_by { |r2| labels.index(r2[0]) }.map { |v2| v3 = v2[0]; [(@smart_values[@columns[0]] || {})[v3.to_s] || v3, v2[2]] }} } %>
+      <%= render partial: "chart", locals: {type: "ColumnChart", data: chart_data, options: chart_options} %>
+      <%= render partial: "chart", locals: {type: "ScatterChart", data: @rows, options: chart_options} %>
